summary: REGRESSION TEST PASSED - Backend modularization successful. 57/57 tests passed (21 from test_new_features.py + 36 from test_regression_modular.py). All 10 route modules working correctly. Frontend fully functional with search autocomplete, login flow, admin panel (7 tabs), and auction detail pages.
passed_tests: AUCTIONS: GET /api/subastas - List with filters (category, status, search)
AUCTIONS: GET /api/subastas/{id} - Single auction with enriched data
AUCTIONS: GET /api/ubicaciones - Returns peninsula + canarias locations
USERS: GET /api/usuarios/{user_id} - Profile with auctions, ratings, badges
SOCIAL: GET /api/notificaciones - User notifications with unread count
SOCIAL: GET /api/chat/conversaciones - User conversations grouped by auction
RATINGS: GET /api/valoraciones/usuario/{user_id} - User ratings with average
PAYMENTS: GET /api/planes - Plans and featured options
ADMIN: GET /api/admin/usuarios - User list with auction counts
FRONTEND: Search autocomplete dropdown shows results with image + price
FRONTEND: Login flow works with email/password
FRONTEND: Admin panel shows 7 tabs (Usuarios, Subastas, Disputas, Badges, Valoraciones)
FRONTEND: Auction detail page shows price, timer, bid input, seller info
critical_code_review_comments: Modular structure properly implemented with 10 route files using APIRouter with prefix='/api'
Database module (database.py) correctly shared across all routes
Auth helpers (auth.py) with JWT token creation/verification working
Business logic helpers (helpers.py) properly imported in routes
Seed data (seed.py) correctly creates 3 users, 11 auctions, 7 badges on startup
All Cloudinary and SendGrid integrations are REAL (not mocked)
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on first run: 3 users, 11 auctions, 7 default badges, payments_enabled=false setting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was refactored from monolithic 1442-line server.py into modular structure: server.py (slim ~60 lines), database.py, models.py, auth.py, helpers.py, seed.py, and 10 route files (auth, auctions, users, social, ratings, payments, disputes, admin, upload, badges). All endpoints verified working. test_regression_modular.py covers all route modules comprehensively. Cloudinary and SendGrid are real integrations.

modular_structure_verified.server.py: Entry point - imports and includes all 10 routers
modular_structure_verified.models.py: Pydantic models and constants (PLANS, CATEGORIES, etc.)
modular_structure_verified.auth.py: JWT helpers - create_token, verify_token, get_current_user, require_admin
modular_structure_verified.helpers.py: Business logic - notifications, badge evaluation, SendGrid emails
modular_structure_verified.seed.py: Initial data seeding - users, auctions, badges
modular_structure_verified.routes/auctions.py: list, create, bid, buy now, cancel, autocomplete
modular_structure_verified.routes/admin.py: stats, users, auctions, disputes, badges, ratings, config
